completion: Arrr, a grand day on the high seas, matey! We spied a merchant ship an' gave chase till the sun dipped below the waves.
Aye, find ye a tattered map an' a logbook o' old sea captains, ye landlubber! Their tales o' kraken an' gold be better than any yarn.
Naught but a rousin' sea shanty, matey! Stomp yer boots an' bellow the chorus till the whole crew be singin' along, arrr!
